channel.title: ide on ilo
channel.description: Recent content in ide on ilo

item.title: Editors
item.description: IntelliJ IntelliJ Idea is a popular IDE by Jetbrains. It allows several ways to share settings across team members in a project. ilo stores its IntelliJ settings inside its git repository and thus should work out-of-the-box for other IntelliJ users. In case you have trouble getting ilo to work in IntelliJ, take a look at the help section.
